assertions.description: INCORRECT: The crocus board uses a nRF24L01+ SPI 2.4 GHz radio (U1) and a PCA9674 I2C expander (U2). The correct SPI bus (bus_id=0) is detected with MOSI/MISO/SCK. However a spurious second SPI bus (bus_id='pin_U1') is also emitted where MOSI=CSN (the nRF chip select) and MISO=CE (the chip enable), which are not data lines. Separately, the I2C detector produces two false entries: CSN reported as SCL for both U1 and U2, and IRQ reported as SDA for both. These pin names (CSN, IRQ, CE) do not indicate I2C functionality.
